title: named area frame
text: named area frame An area frame that defines logical unit in a form or report component. It can be used to format data, or add and protect text. Related Links area frame A development object that can be used to group, separate, or decorate the contents of a form or report component. form An interactive component that enables users to view, create, and modify data in a Windows or character-based application. report A Uniface presentation component that defines the content and layout of printed output of a Uniface application. It can be run locally or remotely, but it cannot be displayed on screen, or update the database. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
